kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: Then User Should See Success Message
And User Should See Logout Button
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Invalid Password

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password' found.

kw.name: Then User Should Remain On Login Page
And User Should See Invalid Password Error Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password' found.

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Invalid Username

kw.name: When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password' found.

kw.name: Then User Should Remain On Login Page
And User Should See Invalid Username Error Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password' found.
